case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. VS. MURIEL FALAK ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 100025813) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200002743) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $441.72 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 200023164) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FALAK, MURIEL
DECLARATION RE: DEFAULT (TRANSACTION ID # 200002743) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FALAK, MURIEL $3,394.04 PRINCIPAL, $547.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,941.04, SEE SCANNED DOC
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT , CONDITIONAL (TRANSACTION ID # 60754832) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.
COST BILL, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $547.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 200002743) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100228362): TSAI, KIMBERLEE RAE SUBSTITUTED FOR WINN, BRIAN N AS ATTORNEY FOR CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT FALAK, MURIEL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-31-2017

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100027130), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. SERVED APR-05-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-13-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT FALAK, MURIEL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAY-19-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200002743) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT FALAK, MURIEL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $280.80 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 65864887) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.
PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION TO ENTER JUDGMENT AFTER BREACH OF STIPULATION FOR SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200002743) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK, N.A.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-19-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
